items.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of an AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana could enhance liquidity and attract new users to the ecosystem.

items.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in AI startup activity at the Consensus Miami hackathon indicates growing developer interest in Solana, potentially boosting ecosystem innovation.

items.title: The CLARITY Act will help reshore the crypto industry in the US — Attorney
items.whyYouShouldCare: The CLARITY Act's potential to reshore the crypto industry may create a more favorable regulatory environment for Solana projects and increase institutional confidence.
